commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=83ddc8eb2fde6f5638921c8d3cdb9d6bf252ee43)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the Feishu plugin to prefer inbound `content_v2` native Markdown with inline image-key replacement and to send selected outbound Markdown through post `tag:md` instead of table conversion or auto card routing.

PR surface: Source +109, Tests +175. Total +284 across 14 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main converts Feishu tables and auto-routes code/table markdown to cards, while PR head removes those paths. I did not run a live Feishu tenant reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs maintainer judgment on Feishu rendering defaults plus contributor-provided real behavior proof; this is not a narrow safe automation repair.

target.title: feat(feishu): native Markdown for inbound content_v2 & outbound tag:md
target.body: ## Summary Align Feishu inbound and outbound on **native Markdown**, backward-compatible and reversible. - **M1 — inbound `content_v2`**: post messages prefer the `content`-parallel `content_v2` array (native Markdown) when feeding the Agent; on missing / empty / non-array / parse-error — and also when a non-empty `content_v2` renders **no usable text/media** — it **structurally falls back** to `content`. **No new config switch.** Non-code-block images `![alt](image_key)` in `content_v2` are downloaded and **inline-replaced with the local path** (code-block occurrences kept literal; each file downloaded once). - **M2 — outbound `tag:md`**: text/markdown replies render natively via the post `tag:md` carrier (incl. code blocks and tables). Two legacy work-arounds are removed: ① auto-mode code-block/table replies auto-upgrading to an interactive card, and ② markdown table downgrade (`convertMarkdownTables`). Explicit cards (`renderMode=card`), presentation buttons, streaming cards, structured cards, and the media pipeline are **left untouched**; the `markdown.tableMode` field is kept (zero compat cost, no doctor migration). The two modules touch disjoint files with no runtime dependency. ## Changes - `post.ts` / `post-image-inline.ts`: content_v2 data-source switch + non-code-block image extract/inline-replace (single source for the code-block boundary, dedupe, offset-based URL splice that avoids touching alt text or corrupting `$` in paths). - `post.ts`: render content_v2 first, then structurally fall back to `content` when the rendered body has no text, images, or media — so the Agent is never fed an empty post body. - `bot-content.ts` / `bot.ts` / `types.ts`: download pipeline backfills `sourceKey`; merge point inline-replaces by key→path. - `outbound.ts` / `reply-dispatcher.ts`: drop the `auto && shouldUseCard` card-upgrade and delete both dead `shouldUseCard` copies. - `send.ts` / `reply-dispatcher.ts`: remove Feishu-side table-downgrade calls (core helper untouched — still used by Telegram etc.). ## Verification - `pnpm test extensions/feishu`: **979 passing** (73 files), incl. M1/M2 cases, review-hardening cases, and the content_v2 empty-render fallback case. - Pre-MR review fixes: inlineReplace mis-replacing `(key)` inside alt text, `$` in path corrupted by `String.replace` semantics, duplicate keys not deduped, and `MARKDOWN_IMAGE_RE`/`maskCodeSpans` duplicated across two files (consolidated to a single source). - Automated review follow-up addressed: content_v2 now falls back to `content` when v2 rendering yields no usable text/media (was: empty body fed to the Agent). - Rebased onto the latest `main`; M2 deletions (`shouldUseCard`, table downgrade) still apply against current upstream Feishu code. - Suggested manual check: headings / tables / code blocks / bold / lists / quotes / links rendered via tag:md post on desktop + mobile (code/table no longer upgrade to a card). ## Refs - Meego: M-7335431104 ## Real behavior proof - **Behavior addressed**: inbound `post` consumes `content_v2` native Markdown (fed to the Agent), and outbound text/markdown replies render via the post `tag:md` carrier (code blocks / tables no longer upgraded to a card; tables no longer downgraded). - **Real environment tested**: Yes — via the Feishu channel, conversing with the Agent and sending Markdown messages (inbound), observing the Agent's Markdown replies (outbound). - **Exact steps or command run after this patch**: deploy this branch; in Feishu, start a conversation with the bot Agent and send Markdown messages; observe how inbound rich-text is parsed and how the Agent's Markdown replies render. - **Evidence after fix**: Supplemental automated check only — `pnpm test extensions/feishu` → 979 passing (73 files). Real-environment Feishu proof to be attached by the author before merge. - **Observed result after fix**: Markdown messages are handled natively — inbound rich text is consumed from `content_v2`, outbound Markdown (incl. code/table) renders via `tag:md` without card upgrade or table downgrade. - **What was not tested**: automated integration/e2e (skipped in this setup); content_v2 `@`-mention inline form pending a real sample (defaults to structured `tag:at`).
target.author: fanghc95
